summary: Iteration 52 - All 10 bug fixes VERIFIED. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified - Prediction submit with 16 answers, Upcoming/Completed tabs, IST time format, My Contests redesign, Admin Matches page with separate status sections.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix 1 (Prediction max_length): contests.py line 55 - max_length changed from 15 to 50 for predictions list
Fix 2 (HomePage tabs): HomePage.jsx lines 250-271 - Upcoming/Completed tabs with matchTab state
Fix 3 (Match sorting): matches.py lines 164-186 - smart sorting: live first, upcoming ascending, completed descending
Fix 4 (IST time): matches.py lines 195-208 - start_time_ist field with IST formatting
Fix 5 (My Contests redesign): MyContestsPage.jsx - stats strip, filter pills, team logos, status badges
Fix 6 (Admin separate fetches): AdminMatchPage.jsx lines 52-61 - separate API calls for live/upcoming/completed
Fix 7 (Admin contest team names): AdminMatchPage.jsx - contest cards show proper team names from match data
Fix 9 (Smart sorting API): GET /api/matches returns live + nearest upcoming + recent completed
Fix 10 (Live ticker IST): cricket.py lines 72-110 - IST conversion from GMT in status text
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 52 verified all 10 bug fixes. Key findings: (1) Prediction endpoint accepts 16 predictions without 422 error - max_length changed from 15 to 50, (2) HomePage has Upcoming/Completed tabs showing 50 upcoming and 3 completed matches, (3) Matches sorted correctly - live first, upcoming by nearest date, completed by most recent, (4) All match cards show IST time format like '31 Mar 2026, 07:30 PM IST', (5) My Contests page redesigned with stats strip (Joined/Correct/Points), filter pills (All/Live/Open/Done), team logos, (6) Admin Matches page has separate sections for LIVE (1), UPCOMING (50), COMPLETED (3), (7) Admin Contest cards show team names 'PBKS vs GT' instead of '? vs ?'. Test data: PBKS vs GT contest ID: c5e299a7-d5c8-4ecc-9010-81964a60d0d4 (live, 16 questions, 16 predictions submitted).

fix_2_homepage_tabs.verification: HomePage has Upcoming (50) and Completed (3) tabs with matchTab state

fix_3_match_sorting.verification: Upcoming sorted ascending (31 Mar → 01 Apr → 02 Apr), Completed sorted descending

fix_4_ist_time_display.verification: Match cards show '31 Mar 2026, 07:30 PM IST' format with Calendar icon

fix_5_my_contests_redesign.verification: Stats strip (1 Joined, 0 Correct, 0 Points), filter pills (All/Live/Open/Done), team logos, progress bar

fix_6_admin_separate_fetches.verification: Admin page shows LIVE (1), UPCOMING (50), COMPLETED (3) sections separately

fix_7_admin_contest_team_names.verification: Contest cards show 'PBKS vs GT | 31 Mar, 07:30 pm IST' instead of '? vs ?'

fix_9_smart_sorting_api.verification: GET /api/matches returns live first, then nearest upcoming, then recent completed

fix_10_live_ticker_ist.verification: Live ticker shows IST times like '06 Apr, 07:30 PM IST' instead of GMT
